name: Zondara's Gravebreakers
inspire:
Immediately after you give a friendly fighter a Raise token, Inspire that fighter.

Immediately after you give a friendly destined ({icon:destined}) fighter their second or subsequent Upgrade, Inspire the other friendly destined ({icon:destined}) fighter.

reactions.name: Gravebreakers
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly minion ({icon:minion}) delves. That fighter can Unearth or a friendly leader ({icon:leader}) can Exhume.
reactions.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly minion ({icon:minion}) delves. That fighter can Unearth or a friendly leader ({icon:leader}) can Exhume.

abilities.name: Destined
abilities.flavorText: Should either Zondara or Ferlain fall, their paramour will be overcome with a total, murderous grief.
abilities.rulesText: While a friendly destined ({icon:destined}) fighter is slain, the other friendly destined ({icon:destined}) fighter has +1 Move and their weapons have +1 Attack dice.

abilities.name: Undying Love
abilities.flavorText: Despite the darkness that has taken them both, Zondara and Ferlain remain devoted to one another.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Pick 2 friendly destined ({icon:destined}) fighters. Heal 1 of those fighters and push the other fighter up to 3 hexes towards the other fighter. You can only use this ability once per battle round.

abilities.name: Exhume
abilities.flavorText: Zondara is not the sort to give up her minions while she still has need of their services.
abilities.rulesText: Pick a slain friendly minion ({icon:minion}). Raise that fighter and place them in a hex adjacent to the friendly fighter that delved. You can only use this ability if it is picked when resolving the Gravebreakers ability.

abilities.name: Unearth
abilities.flavorText: In the blood and bones of the dead might lie the secrets Zondara seeks.
abilities.rulesText: Draw a number of Power cards equal to the number of slain friendly fighters. You can only use this ability if it is picked when resolving the Gravebreakers ability.
